channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: LTFRB reinstates fixed pick-up fares for TNVS to balance drivers' and commuters' concerns
item.description: The Land Transportation Franchising and Regulatory Board (LTFRB) has reinstated fixed pick-up fares for Transport Network Vehicle Services (TNVS) to address rising operating costs for drivers while ma...

item.title: Interior Ministry plans tighter scrutiny for blue passport issuance as debate continues over proposed expansion of eligibility
item.description: Minister of State for Interior Tallal Chaudhry has said the government will introduce stricter checks for the issuance of official blue passports following criticism over a proposed bill that would ex...

item.title: Trump criticizes aide for mimicking his signature gesture in media controversy
item.description: The article details a political controversy involving former President Donald Trump and a media figure accused of mimicking his signature gestures during a public appearance. The incident sparked back...

item.title: World Cup Final Set To Feature Global Stars
item.description: The World Cup final is set to be one of the most anticipated events ever, with a star-studded lineup including Madonna, Burna Boy, Tom Cruise, and Shakira. The event will take place at MetLife Stadium...

item.title: NRL Knights player sustains knee injury during match
item.description: Yasmin Meakes, a key player for the NRL Knights, suffered a significant knee injury during a match, forcing her to leave the field. The incident occurred on July 19, 2026, and has raised concerns abou...

item.title: Kerala Health Minister Directs Probe into KMCSL's Corporate Membership at Thiruvananthapuram Tennis Club
item.description: The Kerala Health Minister, K. Muraleedharan, has directed an immediate inquiry into the circumstances surrounding the Kerala Medical Services Corporation Limited (KMCSL) obtaining corporate membershi...

item.title: Ottawa's Municipal Election: Key Information for Voters
item.description: The article outlines essential details for residents of Ottawa as the city approaches its municipal election, which is set to take place in 100 days. It emphasizes the importance of voter registration...

item.title: Virginia Giuffre's brother continues her fight for justice a year after her tragic death
item.description: Virginia Giuffre's brother, Sky Roberts, reflects on the year since his sister's death by suicide, highlighting ongoing efforts to hold perpetrators accountable for her abuse by Jeffrey Epstein and ot...

item.title: UST Wins Shakey's Juniors Tournament Against SJI-Bacolod
item.description: The University of Santo Tomas (UST) Junior Tigresses secured a hard-fought victory over St. John's Institute-Bacolod (SJI-Bacolod) in the Shakey's Juniors National Invitationals, clinching the champio...

item.title: Junet Mohamed Defends ODM's State House Meetings in Broad-Based Government Role
item.description: Suna East MP Junet Mohamed has defended ODM's decision to hold meetings at State House, countering criticism that the party's presence in the broad-based government makes such gatherings inappropriate...

item.title: Influencer crashes R1.1m Audi in Pretoria residential area, sparking complaints about illegal racing
item.description: A motoring influencer, Kumbirai Mtshakazi, crashed a R1.1m Audi S3 in a Pretoria East residential area, sparking complaints from residents about illegal drag racing and high-speed 'donuts' in the neig...

item.title: NextBSD Revives Project to Port Apple's Darwin Code into FreeBSD with AI Assistance
item.description: The article discusses the revival of NextBSD, a BSD variant project that aims to port components of Apple's Darwin OS onto FreeBSD. Led by developer Joe Maloney (pkg:pkgsrc), the initiative leverages ...

item.title: Oyinkansola Badejo-Okusanya Elected NBA President With Record Votes
item.description: The Nigerian Bar Association (NBA) has officially elected Oyinkansola Badejo-Okusanya as its new president after a highly contested election. The SAN qualified lawyer emerged victorious with 12,317 vo...

item.title: Kim Zolciak Resolves Divorce Financial Obligations to Avoid Jail Time
item.description: Kim Zolciak, a former cast member of 'Real Housewives of Atlanta,' has resolved a legal dispute by paying $2,535 in unpaid fees to a court-appointed guardian, thereby avoiding potential jail time. The...

item.title: Pinda leads urban tree planting initiative for environmental sustainability
item.description: The article highlights Pinda's efforts in promoting urban tree planting as a key strategy for environmental sustainability. It mentions training programs and control centers aimed at revitalizing the ...

item.title: UK Experiences Temporary Cooling Amid Ongoing Dry Spell
item.description: The UK is set to experience a brief respite from the ongoing heatwave as cooler temperatures arrive in parts of the country. However, the prolonged dry spell is expected to persist, with significant i...

item.title: Pakistan and Venezuela Strengthen Economic Ties Through High-Level Dialogue
item.description: Deputy Prime Minister and Foreign Minister Ishaq Dar engaged in a phone call with Venezuela's newly appointed Foreign Minister Felix Plasencia, emphasizing the 'considerable potential' for enhancing e...

item.title: Witness no-shows mount as Carrim faces medical testimony delay
item.description: The Investigating Directorate Against Corruption (Idac) is under intense scrutiny following reports that the 'Madlanga sick bay' has claimed another witness. This comes amid pressure on North West bus...

item.title: German Groom Adheres to Kenyan Tradition by Walking Cows for Dowry Ceremony
item.description: A German man recently experienced a unique cultural tradition when he walked cows to his Kenyan in-laws as part of a dowry ceremony. Mudge Rulf, a Kenyan epidemiologist living in Germany, shared how h...

item.title: Microsoft's Workaround Raises Security Concerns for U.S. Defense Department
item.description: ProPublica's investigation revealed Microsoft's practice of using Chinese engineers to support the U.S. Defense Department through a 'digital escort' system, where code was transferred via U.S. citize...
